docket_entries.description: REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY CLAIMANT CABRERA, STEPHEN HEARING SET FOR NOV-04-2015 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
PETITION SIX THOUSAND EIGHT HUNDRED AND TWENTY-THREE DOLLARS FILED BY CLAIMANT CABRERA, STEPHEN
FIRST PAPER IN UNLIMITED CIVIL CASE FILED BY CLAIMANT CABRERA, STEPHEN

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON NOV-04-2015 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/CLAIMANT STEPHEN CABRERA'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: JOHN K. STEWART; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO CLAIMANT CABRERA, STEPHEN
